message:
chore: regenerate Cargo.lock for v0.2.27 workspace version bump

Update Cargo.lock to reflect the v0.2.25 → v0.2.27 version bump across
all workspace crates: mcp-agent-mail, mcp-agent-mail-cli,
mcp-agent-mail-conformance, mcp-agent-mail-core, mcp-agent-mail-db,
mcp-agent-mail-guard, mcp-agent-mail-search-core, mcp-agent-mail-server,
mcp-agent-mail-share, mcp-agent-mail-tools, and mcp-agent-mail-wasm.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4670,7 +4670,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]

-version = "0.2.25"
+version = "0.2.27"

  "criterion",
